name: mv3-ai-extension-compiler
description: A compliance-first pipeline for compiling AI-generated Chrome MV3 extensions using OpenAI or GitHub Models.

scripts.lint: node --check index.js && node --check chatbot.js && node --check ai-orchestrator.js && node --check validator.js && node --check permission-optimizer.js && node --check mutator.js && node --check vendor-ingestor.js && node --check packager.js
